content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

No source implementation changes for the requested robustness goal are present in this patch; only review metadata files were updated, so the intended behavior is unchanged.

## Amendments

1. The submitted change set does not implement the requested lifecycle hardening in code. `git diff --name-only` only reports `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/run.json` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/journal.ndjson` (metadata/journal lines `run.json:12-29`, `journal.ndjson:402-408`), and there are no diffs under `src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/cli/run.rs`, or `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`. As a result, PID-file liveness, `run stop`, stale status detection, automatic stale resume recovery, and SIGTERM cleanup behavior are not introduced by this patch and acceptance criteria are not met by the current diff.
   Rationale: A reviewer should gate this patch from progressing until required source changes land, because this diff appears to be only review bookkeeping (metadata/events) and cannot change run lifecycle correctness.
